leadText: Power Gem (Japanese: パワージェム Power Gem) is a damage-dealing Rock-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TR63 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM101 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM019 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations IV and V 1.2 Generation VI onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV and V [ edit | edit source ] Power Gem inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. Power Gem's base power is 70. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Power Gem's power changed from 70 to 80. sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Despite not being able to learn it in Generation VI , Diancie is seen using Power Gem on X and Y 's official website . However, since the battle takes place in a cave , it is possible the move Diancie used was actually Nature Power .
